name: Pythia Oracle
description: Native Pythia Oracle tool with x402 payment support and chat approvals.

url.description: Remote MCP endpoint for the Pythia Oracle service.

serviceName.description: Human-friendly label shown in approval prompts.

walletPrivateKeyEnvVar.description: Environment variable that holds the Base wallet private key used for x402 payments.

defaultAgentId.description: Fallback agent_id when the runtime does not provide one.

expectedPriceUsd.description: Expected price per paid reading in USD for approval and budget checks.

autoApproveUnderUsd.description: Automatically approve paid requests at or below this USD threshold.

dailyBudgetUsd.description: Maximum USD spend per UTC day for this agent.

totalBudgetUsd.description: Maximum lifetime USD spend for this agent.

approvalTimeoutMs.description: How long to wait for an in-channel payment approval before aborting.

allowAlwaysCache.description: Persist allow-always approvals for the same payment destination.
